report.name: Regional Office Branch - Lean Readiness Assessment

categories.name: Customer Focus

attachments.name: customer_survey_placeholder.jpg
attachments.description: Planned customer satisfaction survey template for implementation

categories.description: Initial assessment of customer focus practices in regional office

statements.name: My organization does a good job of listening and involving its customers.
Customer satisfaction measurements capture actionable information needed for improvement.
My organization obtains and uses customer information relative to competition and/or benchmarks.
Customer satisfaction takes top priority at my organization.
My organization remains flexible to changing customer needs and expectations.
We practice fair and equitable business practices for our customers, suppliers, and employees.

categories.name: Leadership

attachments.name: regional_office_meeting.jpg
attachments.description: Regional office team meeting to discuss lean transformation goals

categories.description: Assessment of leadership commitment to lean transformation in regional office

statements.name: Leadership has defined and communicated a clear vision and is committed to process improvement.
Process improvement is regularly discussed at our strategic planning meetings.
Adequate resources are continuously assigned for achieving operational excellence (i.e., process improvements.)
We have a good balance of attainable and stretch goals.
We have process owners that are held accountable for performance measurements.

categories.name: Process Management
categories.description: Review of current process management capabilities and gaps

statements.name: My organization identifies its key processes to achieve improved performance.
Performance measures are used for the control and improvement of key processes.
The processes that we use are smooth and work well.
Input from internal and external customers are incorporated into process improvement efforts.
All necessary resources and information are available to do the work properly.
Process variation is understood and monitored at my organization.

categories.name: Staff (Employee) Management
categories.description: Evaluation of employee management practices and development opportunities

statements.name: Leaders demonstrate that the safety of employees is of paramount importance.
Employees's training and development needs are openly discussed and followed through on.
Leadership creates an encouraging and motivating environment and helps employees reach their full potential.
Employees can openly identify obstacles/problems and seek help in finding solutions.
Our performance management system supports and rewards high performance.
Employees are treated as valued employees, where short and long term needs are met.
Input from internal and external customers are incorporated into process improvement efforts.

categories.name: Information/Analysis
categories.description: Assessment of data management and analytical decision-making capabilities

statements.name: My organization makes every effort to ensure data and information are appropriate, accurate, and reliable.
There is a system in place to monitor organizational progress against set objectives or goals.
The monitoring system is clear and visible to all of the organization (e.g., scoreboards).
It is clear to people how we use organizational level analysis to improve decision-making.
People are responsible to question and/or challenge the status quo.
There is an effective process to incorporate positive improvement ideas into the business plan.

actionItems.title: Lean Transformation Roadmap Development
actionItems.description: Create comprehensive 12-month lean transformation roadmap with clear milestones, training schedules, and resource requirements for regional office

actionItems.title: Customer Voice Integration Program
actionItems.description: Implement systematic customer feedback collection and analysis process, including monthly customer surveys and feedback integration meetings

actionItems.title: Process Mapping and Standardization Initiative
actionItems.description: Map all key business processes, identify improvement opportunities, and create standardized work instructions for consistent execution

actionItems.title: Performance Management System Redesign
actionItems.description: Redesign performance management system to include lean principles, continuous improvement goals, and employee development pathways

actionItems.title: Data-Driven Decision Making Framework
actionItems.description: Establish data collection standards, analytical tools, and decision-making frameworks to support evidence-based improvements
